tactics: conflicting instructions;deceptive irrelevant details;plausible but false assumptions;hidden cost/risk tradeoffs
required_patterns: assumptions and alternatives;priority order;contradiction check;trap and counterevidence check
forbidden_patterns: ship now no matter what;ignore compliance
prompt: You are launching a healthcare AI feature in 2 weeks. A VP says HIPAA does not apply because data is de-identified, while legal says re-identification risk is high. Marketing insists on immediate launch. Build a decision memo with one plan, one safer fallback, and how you will challenge deceptive assumptions with evidence.

tactics: looks-like-known-pattern but is different;plausible but false assumptions;underspecified constraints
required_patterns: cross-domain integration;assumptions and alternatives;verification evidence;next improvement
prompt: Teach a junior SRE why queue latency improved while user complaints rose. They assume latency alone proves success. Explain with architecture, product UX, risk/compliance, and causal metrics, including one misconception trap and a verification plan.

required_patterns: recovery and self-correction;verification evidence;contradiction check;next improvement
prompt: You have partial logs from a failed deploy and conflicting timestamps from two services. Produce a forensic triage plan that explicitly shows how you will revise course after re-evaluating if first hypotheses fail.
